overview: Computing science graduate with 3+ years industry (software testing & development) and research experience (astrophysics & quantum algorithms)
A fast learner who is experienced in working in team centric and fast pace environments
Proficient in OOP languages, C/C++ & Swift, as well data analysis language, Python

positions.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
description: Supervised by Dr. Joanna Woo to investigate changes in galaxies' densities during galaxy quenching
Processed IllustrisTNG cosmological magnetohydrodynamical simulations data to statistically visualize compaction effect at the end of galaxies evolution on high performance computing clusters (HPC)

positions.title: Lead Software Developer
description: Developed the front-end and back-end for a skills learning platform using ReactJS and NodeJS and setup CI/CD with GitHub Actions for the project
Designed overall back-end structure for users data, program info e.g. and API methods with Google Firebase Firestore & Functions

Planned and oversaw the project in (3+ developers) team to ensure the main launch features (discussion community, customizable portfolio and video-based learning e.g.) are completed in seven months and within required budget

positions.title: Software Developer
description: Diagnosed and addressed 100+ reported issues and assisted development teams with triaging customer and field issues
Assisted with developing and optimizing front-end UI features based on engineers and UX requirements mainly using language Swift in Xcode IDE and Objective-C occasionally
Assisted with integrating business analytics tools and user-data protection within different networking protocols (SOAP and REST APIs) in the application

positions.title: Certification Engineer (Co-op)
description: Drove configuration management for multiple LTE and 5G mobile hotspot products based on regulatory requirements and built customized package for different carriers
Triaged and tracked customer issues then coordinated with firmware, software and certification team for troubleshooting issues in a fast pace agile workplace

Developed and maintained automated software tools and build scripts to improve workflow process, data analysis and project test in LTE Advanced Carrier Aggregation combination using Python, C#, .NET framework, AT commands and Visual Basic

experience.title: Resumpy
description: Developed Python scripts for automate clean documents generation of resume, CV and cover letter in PDF format (this resume is generated using this software)
Designed parsing mechanism of JSON data to generic document components and layout settings written in \LaTeX
Implemented the modules in a form of deployable dockerized RESTful API service using Python Flask framework

experience.title: Stable Matching Quantum Algorithm
experience.nature: Special Topics in Theoretical Computing Science - Intro to Quantum Computing, SFU
description: Utilized Grover’s algorithm and designed a quantum algorithm ($O(n\sqrt{n})$) which outperformed the classical Gale-Shapley stable matching algorithm ($O(n^2)$) in terms of time complexity
Researched and designed search blackboxes for all entities in the proof of concept demo
Designed method to compute stability of all possible stable matches and return the moststable matching pair with an accuracy of 75\% on Qiskit Aer quantum computing simulator

experience.title: Bluetooth HID Relay
description: Designed hardware schematic to connect Arduino (Uno), USB host shield and RN42 Bluetooth module as a keyboard relay adaptor
Developed driver code in C++ to read keyboard inputs through USB host shield and broadcast input signals via Bluetooth
Improved driver code efficiency in power consumption and included software support for N-keys rollover

experience.title: Easy Text
description: Created text scraping from web page module and texts summarizing module using Python with integration of Google Cloud Platform Natural Language model
Deployed the module in a form of RESTful API service on Google Cloud Platform App Engine using Python Flask framework
Created responsive layout website which takes user input (text or URL) then sends and retrieves requests to the Flask server with ReactJS and Semantic UI React framework

education.degree: Bachelor of Science, Majoring in Computing Science
